scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.json sw.js robots.txt www/ && cp -r css js assets www/
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk: npm run sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/android-studio/jbr ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Android/Sdk ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd .. && mkdir -p apks && cp android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk "apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').apk" && rclone copy "apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').apk" "luca.forina:Breaktime-Rebellion/" && echo "APK caricato su Drive: apks/breaktime-rebellion-v$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').apk"
